title: Better Clocks!
description: Clocks in Minecraft that show ingame date and time!
body:
Better Clocks! Is a simple mod that displays the date and time of your world when you right click a clock. The purpose for making this mod was because, while this has been done before, most of those mods are either unavailable for fabric or no longer being maintained. So, for this purpose, I made this mod hoping to keep it maintained for many more versions to come. I'd appreciate you downloading it!

Requires the Fabric API and Fabric Loader 0.16.10 and up.
